channel.title: Azure Access Technology — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Azure Access Technology (azure-access).

item.title: CVE-2025-12603 · 2.3 LOW — /etc/timezone can be Arbitrarily Written
item.description: /etc/timezone can be Arbitrarily Written.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12602 · 2.3 LOW — /etc/avahi/services/z9.service can be Arbitrarily Written
item.description: /etc/avahi/services/z9.service can be Arbitrarily Written.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12601 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Denial of Service Due to SlowLoris
item.description: Denial of Service Due to SlowLoris.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12600 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Web UI Malfunction
item.description: Web UI Malfunction when setting unexpected locale via API.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12599 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Multiple Devices are Sharing the Same Secrets for SDKSocket (TCP/5000)
item.description: Multiple Devices are Sharing the Same Secrets for SDKSocket (TCP/5000).This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12554 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Security Headers
item.description: Missing Security Headers.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12553 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Server Certificate Verification Disabled
item.description: Email Server Certificate Verification Disabled.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12552 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insufficient Password Policy
item.description: Insufficient Password Policy.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12517 · 2.1 LOW — Credits Page not Matching Versions in Use in the Firmware
item.description: Credits Page not Matching Versions in Use in the FirmwareThis issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12516 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Lack of Graceful Error Handling - HTTP 5xx Error
item.description: Lack of Graceful Error Handling - HTTP 5xx ErrorThis issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12515 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Systemic Internal Server Errors - HTTP 500 Response
item.description: Systemic Internal Server Errors - HTTP 500 ResponseThis issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12479 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Systemic Lack of Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) Token Implementation
item.description: Systemic Lack of Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) Token Implementation.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12478 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Non-Compliant TLS Configuration
item.description: Non-Compliant TLS Configuration.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12477 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Server Version Disclosure
item.description: Server Version Disclosure.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12476 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Resource Lacking AuthN
item.description: Resource Lacking AuthN.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12425 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: Local Privilege Escalation.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12424 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege Escalation through SUID-bit Binary
item.description: Privilege Escalation through SUID-bit Binary.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12423 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Denial of Service - Protocol Manipulation
item.description: Protocol manipulation might lead to denial of service.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5 .

item.title: CVE-2025-12422 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Vulnerable Upgrade Feature (Arbitrary File Write)
item.description: Vulnerable Upgrade Feature (Arbitrary File Write) may lead to obtaining super user permissions on board.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12365 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Error Messages Wrapped In HTTP Header
item.description: Error Messages Wrapped In HTTP Header.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12364 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Weak Password Policy
item.description: Weak Password Policy.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12363 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Email Password Disclosure
item.description: Email Password Disclosure.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12285 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing Initial Password Change
item.description: Missing Initial Password Change.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12284 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lack of Input Validation
item.description: Lack of Input Validation in the web UI might lead to potential exploitation.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12275 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mail Configuration File Manipulation + Command Execution
item.description: Mail Configuration File Manipulation + Command Execution.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12278 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Logout Functionality not Working
item.description: Logout Functionality not Working.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12221 · 2.1 LOW — CSRF Token not Properly Implemented
item.description: Busybox 1.31.1 - Multiple Known Vulnerabilities.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12220 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Busybox 1.31.1 - Multiple Known Vulnerabilities
item.description: Busybox 1.31.1 - Multiple Known Vulnerabilities.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12219 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Vulnerable Components in Azure Access OS
item.description: Vulnerable Components in Azure Access OS.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12218 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Weak Default Credentials
item.description: Weak Default Credentials.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12217 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SNMP Default Community String (public)
item.description: SNMP Default Community String (public).This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12216 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Malicious / Malformed App can be Installed but not Uninstalled
item.description: Malicious / Malformed App can be Installed but not Uninstalled/may lead to unavailability.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12176 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Undocumented Administrative Accounts
item.description: Undocumented administrative accounts were getting created to facilitate access for applications running on board.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12114 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Serial Console Enabled
item.description: Enabled serial console could potentially leak information that might help attacker to find vulnerabilities.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12104 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect Content-Type Header
item.description: Outdated and Vulnerable UI Dependencies might potentially lead to exploitation.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12031 · 5.3 MEDIUM — HTTP Security Misconfiguration - Lacking Secure and HTTPOnly Attribute
item.description: HTTP Security Misconfiguration - Lacking Secure and HTTPOnly Attribute may allow reading the sensitive cookies from the javascript contextThis issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-12001 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect Content-Type Header
item.description: Lack of application manifest sanitation could lead to potential stored XSS.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-11925 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect Content-Type Header
item.description: Incorrect Content-Type header in one of the APIs (`text/html` instead of `application/json`) replies may potentially allow injection of HTML/JavaScript into reply.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-11832 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — APIs Lack Rate Limiting
item.description: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling vulnerability in Azure Access Technology BLU-IC2, Azure Access Technology BLU-IC4 allows Flooding.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.
